description: A receipt containing a field named with a Cyrillic lookalike to 'signatures' (U+0456 CYRILLIC SMALL LETTER BYELORUSSIAN-UKRAINIAN I instead of U+0069 LATIN SMALL LETTER I). A conforming canonicalization boundary must reject non-ASCII object member names before projection so spoof-like field names cannot enter attestation input.

s\u0456gnatures.note: This field name uses Cyrillic i (U+0456) not Latin i (U+0069). It looks like 'signatures' but is not in the exclusion set. It should be rejected or sanitized before projection.

expected_behavior.correct: Field-name validation rejects the receipt before projection or other attestation input formation because object member names must be ASCII-only.
expected_behavior.historical_broken_behavior: Field passed through to canonical projection, entered bundle_digest, and allowed injected signed content through a non-excluded lookalike field name.

conformance_requirement: A conforming canonicalization boundary MUST reject non-ASCII object member names before computing canonical projection or other attestation input. Unicode homoglyphs of excluded field names must not reach the projection layer.
